query_used: What are the technical specifications and capabilities of KittenTTS?
findings:
ResearchFinding(title='Direct Link 1', url='https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS', snippet='Content provided directly by user.', full_content='🎉 ANNOUNCEMENT: New version of KittenTTS is now available to download!
Kitten TTS is an open-source realistic text-to-speech model with just 15 million parameters, designed for lightweight deployment and high-quality voice synthesis.
Currently in developer preview
For custom support - fill this form
Email the creators with any questions : info@stellonlabs.com
- Ultra-lightweight: Model size less than 25MB
- CPU-optimized: Runs without GPU on any device
- High-quality voices: Several premium voice options available
- Fast inference: Optimized for real-time speech synthesis
Some users are facing minor issues with the kitten-tts-nano-int8 model. We are looking into it. Please report to us if you face any issues.
final_vid.mp4
pip install https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS/releases/download/0.8.1/kittentts-0.8.1-py3-none-any.whl
from kittentts import KittenTTS
m = KittenTTS("KittenML/kitten-tts-mini-0.8")
audio = m.generate("This high quality TTS model works without a GPU.", voice='Jasper' )
# available_voices : ['Bella', 'Jasper', 'Luna', 'Bruno', 'Rosie', 'Hugo', 'Kiki', 'Leo']
# Save the audio
import soundfile as sf
sf.write('output.wav', audio, 24000)
Works literally everywhere. Needs python3.12. We recommend using conda.

ResearchFinding(title='Direct Link 3', url='https://huggingface.co/KittenML/kitten-tts-nano-0.8-int8', snippet='Content provided directly by user.', full_content='Kitten TTS Nano 0.8 😻
Kitten TTS is an open-source realistic text-to-speech model with 15 million parameters and around 25MB of filesize.
🚀 Quick Start
Installation
pip install https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS/releases/download/0.8/kittentts-0.8.0-py3-none-any.whl
Basic Usage
from kittentts import KittenTTS
m = KittenTTS("KittenML/kitten-tts-nano-0.8-int8")
audio = m.generate("This high quality TTS model works without a GPU", voice='Jasper' )
# available_voices : ['Bella', 'Jasper', 'Luna', 'Bruno', 'Rosie', 'Hugo', 'Kiki', 'Leo']
# Save the audio
import soundfile as sf
sf.write('output.wav', audio, 24000)
Acknowledgements
StyleTTS 2 architecture
- Downloads last month
- 1,640
Inference Providers NEW
This model isn't deployed by any Inference Provider. 🙋 Ask for provider support', relevance_score=0.8)
key_facts: KittenTTS is an open-source realistic text-to-speech model.
The base version contains approximately 15 million parameters with a file size under 25MB.
It is CPU-optimized and runs inference without a GPU on any device.
It supports 8 distinct voices: Bella, Jasper, Luna, Bruno, Rosie, Hugo, Kiki, and Leo.
The model is currently in developer preview (Version 0.8).
It requires Python 3.12 (Conda is recommended for environment management).
The architecture is based on StyleTTS 2.
Larger versions with 40M and 80M parameters are available alongside the 14M/15M models.
It is designed for lightweight deployment and fast, real-time speech synthesis.
Installation is performed via pip using specific GitHub release wheel files.
structured_summary: KittenTTS is a lightweight, open-source TTS model designed for high-quality voice synthesis without the need for powerful GPUs. With a footprint of less than 25MB and CPU optimization, it is ideal for lightweight deployment across various devices. The model utilizes the StyleTTS 2 architecture and currently supports eight distinct voices in its developer preview (v0.8) phase, making it a strong candidate for real-time applications on resource-constrained hardware.
